lu_code	description	mean_plant_height	kcb_ini	kcb_mid	kcb_end	kcb_min	first_day_of_growing_season	last_day_of_growing_season	planting_date	l_ini	l_dev	l_mid	l_late	l_fallow	irrigation_length	na	rew_1	rew_2	rew_3	rew_4	rew_5	rew_6	rew_7	tew_1	tew_2	tew_3	tew_4	tew_5	tew_6	tew_7	depletion_fraction	gdd_base	gdd_max	mad	irrigation_start	irrigation_end	application_amount	fraction_irrigation_from_gw	application_scheme	irrigation_application_efficiency	variable_rooting_depth
